reference: My seven-year-old daughter has been having a high fever for the last three days, and today I noticed that her gums are purple. She has also been complaining of a headache and had diarrhea on the first day. Is this something I should take her to the emergency room for, or should I let it run its course?
text: My seven-year-old daughter has been having a high fever for the last three days, and today I notice that her gums are purple. She has also been complaining of a headache and had diarrhea on the first day. Is this something I should take her to the emergency room for, or should I let her run its course?
